title: high road
body:
i get high as i can get and yet
i always find there's another step to take before i can see it all
still y'all all already look so small
never see your faces except in pictures
same with god's except it's scriptures
play the odds cuz that's all they give
deal with the pain that the draw deliver
read the cards like my women taught
map the lines from the ways they brought me
up to the moment that i found my footing
now i give back with the work i put in
get down to business, gotta earn a living
live down what it is, you can turn a prophet
all you gotta do is learn to give in
the wheel will turn, it ain't your turn to stop it

wav:
